payload.answer: I didn’t save that as durable memory because “today’s weather is cloudy” is temporary and lacks lasting personal value. If you want, you can save it as a dated note instead.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable personal memory entity is present.

details: Suggested a repair by converting the statement into a dated note with proper punctuation.

repair_options: Save it as a dated note: "Weather on 2026-05-07 was cloudy."
Store a durable preference or fact instead, e.g. "I prefer cloudy weather."
